card-me.title: My Journey
card-me.description: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer based in Tubarão, Santa Catarina, Brazil. My main focus is building efficient architectures and intuitive end-to-end experiences using modern technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, and React. From complex back-end business logic to smooth front-end interfaces, I'm dedicated to writing clean, maintainable, and functional code.
